focus: Examine mk-goal-*.test.cjs suite: command-namespace + code-tail (L1510-1676) coverage. Confirmed namespace untested; tail helper bodies covered but factory hooks (transform/event/tool-binding/error-swallow) are not. New F-018..F-022.
